title: The Taste of Violence
writer: Robert Hossein, Louis Martin, Claude Desailly
actors: Robert Hossein, Giovanna Ralli, Mario Adorf
plot: This European "western" by Robert Hossein (screenwriter, director, and lead) is set in an unnamed Latin American country suffering under a dictator. A revolution is underway, or at least there is a strong guerrilla movement here. ...
